name: What's my warehouse hand injury case worth in Boise?

mainEntity.name: What's my warehouse hand injury case worth in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.description: **$50K-$500K+ via comp/settlement, based on permanency, wages lost, age.** Severe like meat grinder: total disability max.[3] Key factors: impairment rating; future care costs. Get multiple evals; negotiate hard. High-value if permanent.[3]
